form.formComment: Filly returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation 14th of 16 at Flemington in the G3 Red Roses November 6 over 1100m, 6 len behind Point Barrow carrying 56kg at $31. Previously first up; third of 8 at Moonee Valley 3yo Bm70 October 24 over 1000m, 0.9 len behind Sisstainable carrying 57kg at $4.20. This easier than anything she's been in to date and trialling up well.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation second of 8 at Caulfield Heath 3yo F Bm64 November 12 over 1100m, soft track; 1.0 len behind Blaze Away with 59kg at $12. When resuming last campaign third of 9 at Sale Mdn-Sw October 8 over 1112m, 3.5 len behind Bajaria with 57kg at $3.40. Imperatriz's half-brother who won't ever scale the heights of big sis but is rarely far away.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 3.5 len at this track Bm56 March 22 over 1135m defeating Bama Slama with 58.5kg at $3.40. Previously second-up 2nd of 11 at Ararat Bm58 on March 27 2025 over 1306m, head behind Maximum Power carrying 58kg at $8.50. Sure to go well again. Nice win first-up but meets some handy types here.
